overall.description: First-person exploration through a foggy desert wasteland at night in Cyberpunk 2077, approaching and passing a distant illuminated Arasaka corporate building with neon signage, then continuing into the open Badlands with scattered Joshua trees and rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wasteland approach to corporate tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the foggy desert toward the illuminated Arasaka building

entered.detail: tall modern corporate building with illuminated red and white signage visible through fog
scattered silhouetted desert trees dotting the landscape
sandy ground with sparse dry vegetation and small rocks

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy desert wasteland at night, with the camera moving forward toward a distant illuminated corporate tower. Sparse Joshua trees are scattered across the sandy terrain, and the teal-neon glow of the building's signage cuts through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing through tree clusters toward building

events.description: camera pans slightly left, shifting view from the building to the path ahead while maintaining forward momentum

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the desert, passing between Joshua trees while keeping the building in peripheral view

segments.scene_description: The camera continues moving through the wasteland, passing clusters of Joshua trees that shift from left to right in the frame. The Arasaka tower remains visible on the right but grows more distant as the path curves slightly, with the fog maintaining consistent atmospheric density.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky wasteland with distant urban lights

events.description: corporate building exits frame right, revealing expansive open wasteland with distant city lights on horizon

agents.ego_description: moving deeper into the open Badlands, navigating rocky terrain as the city lights fade into the distance

entered.detail: faint illuminated structures and towers visible on the distant horizon through the fog
large boulders and uneven rocky formations emerging from the ground

segments.scene_description: The Arasaka building disappears from view as the camera turns left into the open wasteland. The terrain becomes rockier with visible boulders, and distant city lights twinkle on the horizon. The Joshua trees are left behind, leaving an empty, desolate landscape dominated by fog and scattered rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy desert wasteland that shifts from a corporate-lit horizon to a desolate, rocky expanse. It begins by moving forward through sandy terrain toward a distant illuminated corporate tower, where the teal-neon glow of signage cuts through the dense haze. As the camera advances, clusters of Joshua trees drift across the frame while the Arasaka tower recedes into the distance on the right. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left, leaving the trees behind and causing the corporate building to disappear from view. Finally, the landscape opens into a rockier terrain filled with boulders and distant twinkling city lights under a heavy, atmospheric fog.
